channel.title: Barista Techniques on Barista At Home
channel.description: Recent content in Barista Techniques on Barista At Home

item.title: How to Make Cold Foam at Home (3 Methods)
item.description: Learn how to make cold foam at home with a milk frother, blender, or mason jar. Step-by-step guide covering sweet cream cold foam, vanilla cold foam, and dairy-free options.
